Quantistry, a Berlin-based company shaping the future of materials powered by AI and Quantum, will collaborate with the multinational aerospace corporation Airbus on a joint R&D project.
Quantistry, a Berlin-based company shaping the future of materials powered by AI and Quantum, will collaborate with the multinational aerospace corporation Airbus on a joint R&D project.

[Quantistry](https://www.quantistry.ai/) and [Airbus](https://www.airbus.com/en) will be working together over the course of 24 months, leveraging their respective strengths to successfully complete the project.

interaction_phrase: announced today a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore hybrid classical-quantum solutions
occurrence_sentence: Quantistry, a Berlin-based start-up offering the world's most intuitive cloud-native chemical simulation platform, and IQM Quantum Computers (IQM), a global leader in building quantum computers, announced today a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore hybrid classical-quantum solutions, focusing on R&D challenges in the chemical and material industry.

interaction_phrase: announce a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore hybrid quantum solutions
occurrence_sentence: Quantistry, a Berlin-based start-up offering the world's most intuitive cloud-native chemical simulation platform, and IQM Quantum Computers (IQM), a global leader in building quantum computers, announced today a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore hybrid classical-quantum solutions, focusing on R&D challenges in the chemical and material industry.

interaction_phrase: combining their technical expertise to integrate cutting-edge quantum systems into QuantistryLab
occurrence_sentence: Through this collaboration, IQM and Quantistry are combining their technical expertise to integrate cutting-edge quantum systems into QuantistryLab, Quantistry's chemical simulation platform.

interaction_phrase: combining their technical expertise to integrate cutting-edge quantum systems into QuantistryLab
occurrence_sentence: Through this collaboration, [IQM](https://meetiqm.com/) and [Quantistry](https://www.quantistry.ai/) are combining their technical expertise to integrate cutting-edge quantum systems into [QuantistryLab](https://www.quantistry.ai/our-platform), Quantistry's chemical simulation platform.

"We are demonstrating our ongoing commitment to accelerating quantum computing innovation and exploring use cases of industrial relevance by extending our relationship with Quantistry," said Dr. Peter Eder, Head of Strategic Partnerships at IQM Quantum Computers.

"The growing collaboration with IQM strengthens Quantistry's commitment to reshape chemical and material R&D, from quantum to AI," said Dr. Arturo Robertazzi, Chief Growth Officer and Co-Founder at Quantistry.
The growing collaboration with IQM strengthens Quantistry's commitment to reshape chemical and material R&D, from quantum to AI,

As quantum computing unlocks new opportunities across diverse industrial sectors, including automotive, aerospace, and energy, Quantistry and IQM join forces to turn these potentially disruptive prospects into reality.

In March 2024, Quantistry reached a significant milestone: a €3 million funding round led by Ananda Impact Ventures, with contributions from industry players such as Chemovator, the business incubator of BASF.

Quantistry Validates Green Innovation Path for Leading Aerospace Manufacturer
With Quantistry's materials intelligence platform, powered by quantum chemistry modeling, the company accelerated its shift to greener, more sustainable aerospace materials.

interaction_phrase: leveraging Quantistry's AI for materials science platform
occurrence_sentence: AeroDynamics began with a proof-of-concept project, leveraging Quantistry's AI for materials science platform, combined with internal experts and third-party validation, to create a digital-first framework for aerospace innovation.

interaction_phrase: leveraging Quantistry's AI for materials science platform

interaction_phrase: Quantistry validates green aerospace innovation using AI for materials science
occurrence_sentence: Quantistry validates green aerospace innovation using AI for materials science and digital R&D, enabling a leading aerospace manufacturer to achieve 90% faster results, lab-grade accuracy, and eliminate blind synthesis.

interaction_phrase: launched a closed-loop collaboration with Quantistry
occurrence_sentence: To solve this, AutoDynamics launched a closed-loop collaboration with Quantistry.

By combining Quantistry's materials simulation software with internal R&D teams and external suppliers, they created a digital-first framework that enabled rapid iteration, clear decision points, and faster innovation across the mobility supply chain.
To solve this, AutoDynamics launched a closed-loop collaboration with Quantistry.

interaction_phrase: digital alloy design workflows powered by Quantistry's materials simulation software
occurrence_sentence: Starting with benchmark validation against experimental data, EnergyDynamics rapidly scaled to digital alloy design workflows powered by Quantistry's materials simulation software.
